headline: Is It Time To Reassess Boston Scientific (BSX) After Its Recent Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Boston Scientific's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this breakdown is designed to help you assess what you are really paying for. The stock recently closed at US$64.87, with returns of 0.4% over 7 days, a 6.7% decline over 30 days, a 31.5% decline year to date, and a 34.4% decline over 1 year, set against gains of 26.9% over 3 years and 46.6% over 5 years. These moves sit alongside ongoing attention on Boston Scientific's role in medical...
